description:
SUMMER STARTS NOW | EXCLUSIVE DEAL BY BLACKLINE. With The Market Settling & Demand Returning, We're Moving Into Summer Early - Aligned Back To The Blackline Standard. Choose One Of The Following Exclusive Offers Redeemable On Any Of Our Stock Cars. 1. Complimentary PPF (Gloss or Satin) 2. Complimentary 1 Year Insurance Cover (T's & C's Apply) 3. AED 10,000 Auto Loan Down Payment Contribution For More Information Please Reach Out To One Of The Team Today 
 2020 Alfa Romeo Giulia Quadrifoglio, 2.9 TC V6, RWD, 505bhp, 8 Speed Auto. AED 179,000 or AED 2,804 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 99,201 KM's - Alfa Romeo Warranty Valid Until 30th December 2027 or 250,000 KM's - Alfa Romeo Service Contract Valid Until 30th December 2027 or 160,000 KM's - Full Service History - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Carbon Fibre Spoiler - Carbon Fibre Interior - Carbon Fibre Steering Wheel Insert - 8.8” Widescreen Touchscreen Infotainment System - Sports Exhaust - Bluetooth Connectivity - Satellite Navigation - Keyless Entry - Keyless Start - Multi-function Steering Wheel - 14 Speaker Harmon & Kardon Surround Sound System - Dual Zone Climate Control - LED Headlights - Cruise Control - Selective Driving Modes - Rear View Camera
